'''Bwahl''' was a one-eyed [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] salesman/crimelord who operated on [[Torque]].

==Biography==
After the [[Tournament on Serenno/Legends|Tournament on Serenno]], the [[Box/Legends|Box]] came into the possession of Bwahl, and he made it mobile. Bwahl used the Box to travel to the strongholds of his rival [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidics]], where he tortured his enemies for entertainment.<ref name="TBHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>

Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he had some ancient artifacts he wanted to buy, so he gave the currency to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. They traveled to [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]] to deliver and receive the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and artifacts to the salesman, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Jake (miner)|Jake]]. He was known to use [[kessum]] during interrogations.<ref name="TEGtAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>

At one point, [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] daughter [[Ailyn Vel]] took contracts from Bwahl as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].<ref name="In80">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref>

Bwahl owned at least one [[Mark X Executioner droid/Legends|Mark X Executioner droid]]. He used the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] as an offbeat way to execute employees who had done something to disappoint him.<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Bwahl was named after Brendon Wahlberg, a member of the [http://www.myuselessknowledge.com/swfa Star Wars Fanboy Association].
